name: @missionsquad/mcp-etherscan
description: Read-only MCP server for Etherscan V2 and compatible EVM explorers, with configurable base URL, chain ID, and context-bounded responses.

scripts.test: yarn typecheck && yarn test:coverage && yarn test:schema
scripts.format: prettier --check "src/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "scripts/*.mjs" package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json vitest.config.ts README.md missionsquad.server.json .prettierrc.json ".github/workflows/*.yaml"
scripts.format:write: prettier --write "src/**/*.ts" "test/**/*.ts" "scripts/*.mjs" package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json vitest.config.ts README.md missionsquad.server.json .prettierrc.json ".github/workflows/*.yaml"
scripts.prepublishOnly: yarn format && yarn test && yarn build

author: Mission Squad AI <jayson@missionsquad.ai>
